title: EDPB batch manifest
description: One aggregated download batch per (segment, trade date), written atomically by mofsl_file_download_rpa_bot and consumed by EDPBilling_FIle_Upload's POST /batches. See BATCH_HANDOFF_CONTRACT.md.

trade_date.description: ISO YYYY-MM-DD (folder names keep DD-MM-YYYY; manifests are always ISO)

correlation_id.description: End-to-end run correlation id (ticket 11); bot-minted until the engine owns the saga

action.description: The bot action that produced this batch (e.g. 'all')

name.description: Relative to the manifest's directory; flat, no subpaths

exchange.description: Source exchange (metadata; there is no exchange folder level)

kind.description: e.g. trade | position | product_master | settlement | scrip

download_outcome.description: The bot's factual report. The uploader's required-files gate is the sole completeness authority.
